query:
SELECT p.batchNo, p.poNumber, p.stationCode, p.productStatus, p.updatedAt,
       st.stationCode AS taskStationCode, st.taskStatus, st.startedAt, st.completedAt
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN station_tasks st ON st.productId = p.id
WHERE p.batchNo BETWEEN '01400003031' AND '01400003048'
ORDER BY p.batchNo ASC, st.id ASC;
